chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P-S No.1390 of 2023 alongwith C.P-S No.1383 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Hearing of case/priority 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of main case 13.08.2024. Ms. Afroz Haq, advocate along with petitioner. Ms. Razia Danish, advocate for respondent No. 3. After hearing the parties at some length, both the petitions are disposed of with the consent of the parties, whereby subject to deposit of current monthly amount by the petitioner to maintenance of his daughter/ward, namely Yasha Junaid, to be determined by the Executing Court, he would be allowed to meet his daughter twice on first Saturday and third Saturday of each calendar month from 10:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. JUDGE HANIF
